question: Valorant: MIBR vs G2 Esports (BO5) - VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between MIBR and G2 Esports in the VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for February 14 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "MIBR" if MIBR win the match against G2 Esports.

This market will resolve to "G2 Esports" if G2 Esports win the match against MIBR.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

description:

This market will resolve to "1WIN" if 1WIN win the match against Oxuji Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Game Handicap: ALOHA (-1.5) vs Yellow Submarine (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Yellow Submarine and  alohasquad in the CCT Series 7 Group A, scheduled for February 14 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to " alohasquad" if  alohasquad wins 2 or more games than Yellow Submarine in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Yellow Submarine". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

In the upcoming match between Gen.G and Dplus KIA in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 14 at 3:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 42 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

events.title: LoL: Gen.G vs Dplus KIA (BO5) - LCK Cup Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Gen.G and Dplus KIA in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 14 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Gen.G" if Gen.G win the match against Dplus KIA.

This market will resolve to "Dplus KIA" if Dplus KIA win the match against Gen.G.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: Map Handicap: ECF (-1.5) vs Leo Team (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Leo Team and kONO.ECF in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 14 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "kONO.ECF" if kONO.ECF wins 2 or more maps than Leo Team in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Leo Team". 

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: Honor of Kings: Hydra Esports vs eArena - Game 4 Winner
description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Hydra Esports and eArena in the RoV Pro League Group Stage, scheduled for February 14 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hydra Esports" if Hydra Esports win Game 4 against eArena.

This market will resolve to "eArena" if eArena win Game 4 against Hydra Esports.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 4 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 4. 

If Game 4 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

events.title: Honor of Kings: Hydra Esports vs eArena (BO5) - RoV Pro League Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Hydra Esports and eArena in the RoV Pro League Group Stage, scheduled for February 14 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hydra Esports" if Hydra Esports win the match against eArena.

This market will resolve to "eArena" if eArena win the match against Hydra Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: Game Handicap: HE (-2.5) vs eArena (+2.5)
description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Hydra Esports and eArena in the RoV Pro League Group Stage, scheduled for February 14 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hydra Esports" if Hydra Esports wins 3 or more games than eArena in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "eArena". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

This market refers to the Dota 2 match between OG and Team Liquid in the BLAST Slam Playoffs, scheduled for February 14 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "OG" if OG win the match against Team Liquid.

This market will resolve to "Team Liquid" if Team Liquid win the match against OG.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 54.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between OG and Team Liquid in the BLAST Slam Playoffs, scheduled for February 14 at 8:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 55 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 15, 9:15AM-9:30AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
